form.description: Define your assessment criteria and performance levels

ai.title: AI Rubric Generation
ai.description: Describe the rubric you want to create, and AI will generate it for you.
ai.placeholder: e.g., Create a rubric for evaluating 5-paragraph essays in 8th grade English
ai.errorMessage: Failed to generate rubric with AI
ai.editJsonLabel: Edit JSON (changes will be used when you accept)
ai.manualEditHelp: The AI response could not be automatically parsed. Please review and edit the JSON in the JSON tab.
ai.generateDescription: Describe the rubric you want to create, and AI will generate it for you.
ai.promptPlaceholder: e.g., Create a rubric for evaluating 5-paragraph argumentative essays for 9th grade English students
ai.advancedHelp: Advanced users can view and edit the complete prompt template that will be sent to the LLM.
ai.advancedWarning: Note: Editing the prompt may affect generation quality. Only modify if you understand the rubric JSON structure.

metadataForm.heading: Rubric Information
metadataForm.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe the purpose and context of this rubric
metadataForm.optionalHint: These fields are completely optional. Leave blank if not applicable to your rubric.

aiChat.title: AI Assistant
aiChat.welcomeMessage: Ask me to help you create or modify this rubric. Here are some examples:
aiChat.modifyPlaceholder: Ask me to modify this rubric...
aiChat.createPlaceholder: Describe the rubric you want to create...
aiChat.helpText: Press Enter to send, Shift+Enter for new line
aiChat.example1: Create a rubric for evaluating 5-paragraph essays in 8th grade English
aiChat.example2: Make this rubric suitable for 6th graders by simplifying the language
aiChat.example3: Add a creativity criterion to this rubric
aiChat.example4: Convert this to a 4-point scale instead of 5-point
aiChat.example5: Make the descriptions more specific and observable

knowledgeStores.title: Knowledge Stores
knowledgeStores.pageDescription: Manage Knowledge Stores — vector indexes built from library content.
knowledgeStores.loginRequired: You must be logged in to view Knowledge Stores.
knowledgeStores.createNewTitle: Create a Knowledge Store from existing library content
knowledgeStores.noOwned: You have no Knowledge Stores yet. Create one to start indexing library content.
knowledgeStores.noResults: No Knowledge Stores match your search.
knowledgeStores.noContent: No library content linked yet. Add content to start indexing.
knowledgeStores.name: Name
knowledgeStores.testQueryHelp: Run a similarity search against this Knowledge Store to verify it returns useful chunks.
knowledgeStores.lockedNotice: Chunking strategy, embedding vendor / model, and vector DB are locked at creation and cannot be changed.

deleteModal.title: Delete Knowledge Store
deleteModal.message: Are you sure you want to delete this Knowledge Store? All vectors will be permanently removed. The library items will not be affected.

removeModal.title: Remove from Knowledge Store
removeModal.message: Remove this content from the Knowledge Store? Vectors will be deleted but the library item remains intact.

addContentModal.title: Add Library Content to Knowledge Store
addContentModal.description: Pick a library and the items to ingest. Only items with status "ready" can be ingested.
addContentModal.noLibraries: No libraries available. Create a library and import some content first.
addContentModal.noItems2: This library has no ready items to ingest.

lockedConfigNotice.title: These settings cannot be changed later.
lockedConfigNotice.body: Chunking strategy, embedding vendor / model, and vector DB are locked once the Knowledge Store is created. To change them, create a new Knowledge Store.

step0.title: Choose a Library
step0.description: Use an existing Library or create a new one.

step1.title: Library details
step1.description: Give your Library a name and an optional description.

step2.title: Library import settings
step2.description: Defaults work for most cases. Expand to customise import plugins.

step3.title: Add initial content
step3.description: Optionally upload one or more files now. You can always add more later.
step3.uploadHint: Drop files here or click to browse

step4.title: Choose a Knowledge Store
step4.description: Use an existing Knowledge Store or create a new one.

step5.title: Knowledge Store details
step5.description: Name and optional description for the Knowledge Store.

step6.title: Knowledge Store configuration
step6.description: These choices control chunking and embedding. They are LOCKED after creation.
step6.noVendorConfigured: Your organization has no embedding providers configured. Ask an admin to add an API key in the organization settings.

step7.title: Pick items to ingest
step7.description: Choose which library items to index in the Knowledge Store.

step8.title: Review & create
step8.description: Review your choices below. Click Create to proceed.
step8.heading: Review & create

step9.title: All done
step9.heading: You're all set
step9.description: Your Library and Knowledge Store are ready. Ingestion runs in the background — you can check progress on the Knowledge Store page.

draft.banner: You have an unfinished draft from {time}.

savePrompt.title: Save as draft?
savePrompt.body: Your progress will be saved until you log out or close the tab.

libraryStep.title: Library Setup
libraryStep.heading: Library
libraryStep.description: Pick an existing Library or create a new one. A Knowledge Store is always populated from a Library.
libraryStep.createNewHint: Start a fresh Library and import documents.
libraryStep.useExistingHint: Pick a Library you already have and skip ahead to the Knowledge Store steps.
libraryStep.noLibraries: No libraries available. Choose "Create new" instead.
libraryStep.nameTooLong: Name must be less than 100 characters
libraryStep.shareHint: You can change this later from the Library detail view.
libraryStep.pluginNote: Per-plugin parameters can be customized later from the library detail view.

libraryContent.title: Library Content
libraryContent.heading: Initial content
libraryContent.description: Optionally add content to your new Library now. You can also skip this and add content later.
libraryContent.invalidUrl: A valid HTTP(S) URL is required.
libraryContent.invalidYoutubeUrl: A valid YouTube URL is required.
libraryContent.optionalHint: Adding content here is optional — you can also add files, URLs, or YouTube transcripts later from the Library detail page. Note: a Knowledge Store can only ingest items that exist in its Library, so anything you skip now must be added to the Library before it can land in the Knowledge Store.
libraryContent.uploadNote: Content will be imported when you click "Create" in the Review step.
libraryContent.emptyHint: No content queued. You can skip this step.

ksStep.title: Knowledge Store Setup
ksStep.heading: Knowledge Store
ksStep.description: Pick an existing Knowledge Store or create a new one. Existing stores keep their original chunking and embedding settings.
ksStep.createNewHint: Configure a new Knowledge Store with chunking and embedding settings.
ksStep.useExistingHint: Pick a Knowledge Store you already created and ingest more content into it.
ksStep.noStores: No knowledge stores available. Choose "Create new" instead.
ksStep.nameTooLong: Name must be less than 100 characters
ksStep.shareHint: You can change this later from the Knowledge Store detail view.
ksStep.advancedLabel: Advanced: chunking, embedding vendor/model, vector DB
